name: AI provenance manifest: decision_provenance.adrs lists every ADR referenced via Decision: trailer in commit message; architect_session_id linked
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/provenance docs/adr && touch docs/adr/2026-05-04-x.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/provenance-emit.sh" --commit-sha abc123 --decision-trailer "Decision: 2026-05-04-x" && grep "2026-05-04-x" .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc123.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
